first_text_lines: Professional Book Publishing Services
Expert Support for Every Author

Publishing a book can feel overwhelming, but you don't have to do it alone. At Experts Self Publishing, we provide expert editing, proofreading, publishing, and marketing services to help turn your manuscript into a professionally published book.
From your first draft to your final release, we're here to support your publishing journey every step of the way.
Looking for the Right Self-Publishing Partner?
Finding the right publishing company can be challenging, especially for first-time authors. You need more than just a service, you need a team that understands your vision and supports your goals.
last_text_lines: 04. Review & Final Approval
Review every detail of your book and approve the final version before publishing.
05. Publish & Reach Readers
We publish your book across leading platforms and help you connect with readers worldwide.

nearby_text_before: Absolutely. It's never too late to promote your book. A well-planned PR campaign can introduce your title to new readers through fresh media opportunities, online features, and targeted publicity. How Do You Measure the Success of a PR Campaign?

We measure success through meaningful results, including media coverage, podcast appearances, book reviews, increased website traffic, and audience engagement. Every campaign is focused on expanding your reach, building your author brand, and connecting your book with readers who are most likely to engage with your work.

first_text_lines: Every Author Deserves
Professional Author Website Design Services

Build a professional author website that showcases your work, connects with readers, and strengthens your online presence. At Experts Self Publishing, we create websites designed to help authors grow with confidence.
Expand Your Reach with Your Own Author Website

A professional author website helps you build your brand, connect with readers, and showcase your books, all in one place.Your author website is more than an online presence, it's where readers discover your story, explore your books, and connect with you. A well-designed website builds credibility, strengthens your brand, and leaves a lasting impression.

At Experts Self Publishing, we create professional, personalized author websites that reflect your unique voice. From design and content to a seamless user experience, we make it easy to build a website that helps grow your audience and promote your books with confidence.
last_text_lines: Can PR Help If My Book Was Published Some Time Ago?

Absolutely. It's never too late to promote your book. A well-planned PR campaign can introduce your title to new readers through fresh media opportunities, online features, and targeted publicity. With the right strategy, your book can continue gaining visibility and attracting readers long after its original release.
How Do You Measure the Success of a PR Campaign?

We measure success through meaningful results, including media coverage, podcast appearances, book reviews, increased website traffic, and audience engagement. Every campaign is focused on expanding your reach, building your author brand, and connecting your book with readers who are most likely to engage with your work.

nearby_text_before: We match your manuscript with an editor who has experience in your book's genre and style. Our team carefully reviews your project to ensure you receive expert feedback, thoughtful editing, and guidance that best supports your story and publishing goals.
What If I Disagree with the Editor's Suggestions?

That's completely your choice. Our editors provide professional recommendations to strengthen your manuscript, but you remain in full control of every change. We explain our suggestions clearly, giving you the confidence to accept, revise, or decline any edits based on your vision for the book.

first_text_lines: Refine Your Story with Confidence
Professional Book Editing & Proofreading Services

Give your manuscript the professional finish it deserves with expert editing and proofreading. We refine your writing, improve clarity, eliminate errors, and ensure your book is polished, engaging, and ready for publication.
Perfect Every Page with
Expert Editing & Proofreading Services

Every great book begins with a strong manuscript, but careful editing brings it to life. Our professional editors refine your writing, improve clarity, correct errors, and preserve your unique voice, ensuring your book is polished, engaging, and ready for publication.A professionally edited book makes a lasting impression. Great editing strengthens your writing while preserving your unique voice. We carefully review every manuscript to improve clarity, flow, and readability, making sure your story connects with readers from beginning to end.
last_text_lines: How Do I Know Which Editor Is Right for My Book?

We match your manuscript with an editor who has experience in your book's genre and style. Our team carefully reviews your project to ensure you receive expert feedback, thoughtful editing, and guidance that best supports your story and publishing goals.

That's completely your choice. Our editors provide professional recommendations to strengthen your manuscript, but you remain in full control of every change. We explain our suggestions clearly, giving you the confidence to accept, revise, or decline any edits based on your vision for the book.

first_text_lines: Covers That Make Readers Stop
Professional Book Cover Design Services
Your book cover is the first thing readers notice. We create custom book covers that capture attention, reflect your story, and inspire confidence.
Create a Book Cover That Stands Out
Professional Book Cover Design That Captures Attention

Your book cover is the first thing readers notice. A professionally designed cover grabs attention, reflects your story, and builds confidence before the first page is turned. We create custom book covers that leave a lasting impression and inspire readers to discover what's inside.
last_text_lines: How Long Does the Cover Design Process Take?

Most book cover design projects are completed within two to four weeks, including the initial concepts, feedback process, and final adjustments. We provide a clear timeline from the beginning so you always know what to expect.
What if I do not like the initial concepts?

That happens sometimes. And it is okay. The first round is about finding a direction. You tell us what is working and what is not. We go back and try again if needed. The goal is a cover you genuinely love. We keep revising until you are happy.

nearby_text_before: Do I Retain Full Rights to the Book?

Yes, you maintain complete ownership of your book. Our ghostwriting services are designed so that the final manuscript belongs entirely to you, giving you full rights to publish, distribute, and adapt your work as you choose.

There are no hidden restrictions, ongoing obligations, or royalty requirements. Your ideas, your story, and your finished book remain fully yours. We simply provide the writing expertise needed to bring your vision to life.

first_text_lines: Tell Your Story WithProfessional Ghostwriting Services
We turn your ideas into a compelling book while preserving your unique voice. Our experienced ghostwriters write with authenticity, clarity, and care.
Your Ideas Deserve WordsThat Truly Sound Like You
You have the story and the vision. We provide the structure, guidance, and writing expertise to turn your ideas into a book while keeping your voice authentic.

You have the ideas, knowledge, and experiences. What you need is the right support to turn them into a finished book. That is where our expert ghostwriting services come in. We connect you with writers who understand your industry, your message, and your unique voice.

Whether you are sharing your life story, building a business book, or creating a novel, our ghostwriters know how to shape your ideas into engaging and meaningful content. From autobiography and memoir writing to fiction and professional books, we help bring your vision to life while keeping your voice authentic.
last_text_lines: We create clear milestones throughout the process so you always know the progress of your book. Whether you have a launch date, speaking engagement, or personal goal, our team works efficiently to help bring your manuscript to completion while maintaining quality and authenticity.

nearby_text_before: How Do I Choose the Right Illustration Style for My Book?

Choosing the right illustration style starts with understanding your genre, audience, and the feeling you want your book to create. Explore books similar to yours and notice the colors, artwork, and visual styles that catch your attention.

Whether you prefer digital artwork, watercolor designs, or hand-drawn textures, we help you find a style that fits your story. Our team reviews your ideas and connects you with artists who can bring your vision to life. The right illustration style helps your book stand out and capture readers' attention.

first_text_lines: Visuals That Stop Readers Mid-ScrollBook Illustration Services for Every Genre
We create custom book illustrations that capture attention, reflect your story, and inspire readers to explore every page.
Attractive Art for Every PageCustom Book Illustrations That Captivate

Every illustration shapes the reader's first impression. We create custom artwork that reflects your story, captures attention, and brings your book to life with visuals that inspire curiosity and leave a lasting impact.

An exceptional illustration does more than decorate a page. It creates an emotional connection and invites readers into your story before they read a single word. We work with talented artists who understand storytelling and know how to translate your ideas into powerful visuals. Whether you need a book cover illustration that creates mystery, warmth, or excitement, we help you find the right creative style for your project.

Our network includes skilled fantasy book cover illustrators who specialize in building imaginative worlds, along with artists experienced in professional Adobe Illustrator techniques for clean and polished results. Every illustration is carefully created to match your genre, audience, and the overall feel of your book.
last_text_lines: Your ideas and preferences guide every stage of the process. A professional book cover design illustrator values collaboration and works closely with you to create artwork that truly represents your story. After all, it is your book, and your vision should lead every creative decision.

nearby_text_before: Our experienced book trailer makers know how to blend your content with professional visuals, sound, and creative elements to create a polished final product. Whether it is personal footage or special moments that inspired your book, we help turn your materials into a compelling visual experience.
What Makes a Book Trailer Effective?

An effective book trailer captures the true essence of your story. It should reflect the mood, message, and emotion of your book without creating unrealistic expectations. A thoughtful trailer helps readers understand what makes your book unique and builds genuine interest.

Our experienced book trailer makers know how to blend your content with professional visuals, sound, and creative elements to create a polished final product. Whether it is personal footage or special moments that inspired your book, we help turn your materials into a compelling visual experience.

first_text_lines: Promote Your Book WithProfessional Book Trailer Production Services
We create engaging book trailers that capture attention, spark curiosity, and encourage readers to discover your story.
Capture Attention WithProfessional Book Trailer Services
Readers make decisions in seconds. A compelling book trailer grabs attention, sparks curiosity, and gives your story a powerful visual presence that encourages readers to learn more.

A book trailer is more than just a video. It is a visual introduction to your story, characters, and the emotions behind your book. We study successful book trailer examples to understand what captures readers' attention and then create a unique concept tailored to your vision. Whether you need animated book trailers or cinematic live-action visuals, we manage the entire production process with care.

Our affordable book trailer services are designed to help authors promote their books without compromising on quality. The right trailer depends on your genre, audience, and the message you want to share. A nonfiction book trailer may focus on insights and impact, while fiction trailers often highlight emotion, characters, and storytelling.
last_text_lines: Yes, we can incorporate your existing photos, video clips, or music into your book trailer, as long as you have the proper rights or permission to use them. Personal materials can add a meaningful touch and make your trailer feel more connected to your story.

Our experienced book trailer makers know how to blend your content with professional visuals, sound, and creative elements to create a polished final product. Whether it is personal footage or special moments that inspired your book, we help turn your materials into a compelling visual experience.
What Makes a Book Trailer Effective?

An effective book trailer captures the true essence of your story. It should reflect the mood, message, and emotion of your book without creating unrealistic expectations. A thoughtful trailer helps readers understand what makes your book unique and builds genuine interest.

nearby_text_before: Whether you need small improvements or major changes, our creative writing services are built around collaboration. We understand that great writing takes refinement, and we make sure your vision remains at the center of the final work.
How long does a creative writing project take?

It depends on the scope. A short story might take a few weeks. A full novel usually runs four to six months. I set a schedule with clear milestones so you know when to expect each chapter. first_text_lines: Reach Your Readers With ConfidenceProfessional Creative Writing Services
We help transform your ideas into compelling stories with creative writing services designed to engage readers and bring your vision to life.
Turn Your Readers Into Loyal Fans WithProfessional Author Websites
An author website is more than an online profile. It's your digital home where readers discover your books, connect with your story, and stay engaged with your journey as an author.

Every great story starts with an idea. Whether you have detailed chapters, rough notes, or just a concept, we help turn your vision into a compelling manuscript. Our experienced writers understand storytelling, pacing, character development, and structure, ensuring your ideas come together naturally.

From novels and eBooks to scripts and creative content, we tailor our writing approach to match your goals and genre. Every project is crafted with attention to detail, engaging storytelling, and a voice that stays true to your vision.

first_text_lines: Illustrations Built Around Your Story's HeartChildren's Book Illustration Services
We create colorful illustrations that bring stories to life, spark imagination, and help young readers connect with your characters from the very first page.
Illustrations That Capture Young Imaginations From the First Page

Children connect with pictures before they read the words. Beautiful illustrations spark curiosity, bring stories to life, and create memorable moments that keep young readers engaged from beginning to end.

Creating illustrations for children takes more than artistic talent. It requires a deep understanding of storytelling, age-appropriate design, and the emotions that help young readers connect with every page. When illustrations miss the right tone or visual style, even the best stories can struggle to capture a child's imagination.

At Expert Self Publishing, our children's book illustrators create expressive characters, colorful scenes, and engaging artwork that bring stories to life. Every illustration is carefully designed to match your story, age group, and creative vision, making each page enjoyable and easy for young readers to follow.
last_text_lines: Do You Illustrate Both Covers and Inside Pages?

Yes. We create complete children's book illustrations, including eye-catching covers and beautifully illustrated interior pages. Our team ensures a consistent visual style throughout the book, creating a seamless and engaging reading experience that captures young readers' imagination from the cover to the final page.

first_text_lines: Stories That Come Alive on ScreenProfessional Screenplay Writing Services
We transform your ideas into screen-ready scripts with strong structure, authentic dialogue, and compelling scenes that keep audiences engaged from beginning to end.
Stories Don't Start on ScreenThey Start on the Page
Every great screenplay begins with a powerful idea, strong structure, and purposeful storytelling. We help shape your vision into a script that captures attention before it ever reaches the screen.

Writing a screenplay requires more than a great idea. Turning a concept into compelling scenes, engaging dialogue, and a well-paced script takes skill, structure, and creative vision. Many writers struggle with formatting, character development, or keeping the story engaging from beginning to end.

Our team helps transform your ideas into professional, screen-ready scripts. From concept development to the final draft, we focus on strong storytelling, cinematic pacing, and authentic dialogue. Every scene is written with purpose, resulting in a polished screenplay that is ready for the next stage of production.
last_text_lines: We focus on delivering a high-quality screenplay while maintaining an efficient timeline, ensuring every scene receives the attention it deserves.
Is My Script Kept Confidential?

Yes. We treat every screenplay with complete confidentiality. Your ideas, drafts, and finished script are never shared without your permission, ensuring your work remains secure and fully protected throughout the writing process.
Your story always belongs to you, and we are committed to respecting your privacy at every stage of our collaboration.

first_text_lines: Professional Self-Publishing Services – From Manuscript to Market
We help authors publish, format, and distribute their books with a smooth, guided process, removing the complexity and challenges of managing everything on their own.
Why Authors Choose Us Over Other Book Publishers

Finding the right publishing partner can be overwhelming. With so many publishing options and conflicting advice, it's not always easy to know which direction to take. That's why we offer flexible publishing services built around your goals, your timeline, and the vision you have for your book.

Unlike traditional publishers that often involve long waiting periods or limited creative freedom, we make publishing simple and transparent. Whether you're interested in self-publishing or planning to publish on Amazon, our team provides reliable guidance and dedicated support from start to finish.

From your first manuscript to your published book, we're committed to making every step clear and hassle-free. No unnecessary delays, no complicated process just professional publishing services that help you publish with confidence.
last_text_lines: Can you help if I've already self-published my book?

Yes. We regularly work with authors who have already published their books and want to improve the final result. Whether you need a new cover design, professional formatting, editing, or updated publishing support, our team can help enhance your book and prepare it for a stronger release. It's never too late to improve your published work.
How much does it cost to publish with you?

The cost depends on your book, the services you need, and the scope of your project. We offer clear, upfront pricing with no hidden charges. After learning more about your manuscript and publishing goals, we'll provide a detailed quote so you know exactly what's included before the project begins.

Targeted Book MarketingWe connect your book with the right readers through strategic online marketing services designed to increase visibility, engagement, and measurable results.

first_text_lines: Experts Self Publishing was established to help authors navigate the publishing journey with confidence. Built on a commitment to quality, transparency, and personalized support, we work closely with writers to transform manuscripts into professionally published books. Our goal is simple to make publishing straightforward while helping every story reach readers around the world.
Passionate Professionals Behind the Purpose

We are a dedicated team of publishing professionals committed to helping authors turn their ideas into professionally published books. With creativity, experience, and a genuine respect for every writer, we create publishing experiences that support both first-time and established authors around the world.

Experts Self Publishing was built on a simple belief that every author deserves honest guidance, clear communication, and dependable support. We understand that the publishing process can feel confusing, from choosing the right path to managing timelines and expectations. That's why we've created a publishing experience focused on transparency, trust, and personalized assistance from beginning to end.

Our team brings together experienced publishing professionals, creative specialists, and industry experts who are passionate about every book we work on. We take the time to understand your goals, provide thoughtful guidance, and deliver solutions tailored to your publishing journey. Every decision we make is focused on quality, transparency, and helping authors achieve the best possible outcome.

Our commitment has remained the same from the beginning to support authors, respect their creative vision, and provide reliable publishing services they can trust. We believe strong partnerships are built on honesty, professionalism, and consistent results, and those values continue to guide everything we do for authors across every genre and stage of their publishing journey.

first_text_lines: Our Journey Creating Success Stories Together
Receive personalized support designed around your writing goals. Reach out to get professional guidance and the right resources to help bring your story to life with confidence and clarity.
How does the eBook publishing process work?

The eBook publishing process starts by understanding your goals and vision. We guide you through each stage, including planning, editing, formatting, and final preparation. Once everything is approved, your eBook is published and made available across major platforms, helping you reach more readers with a professional finish.
Who controls the content of my book?

You remain in complete control of your book from start to finish. Our team works with you to improve and refine your manuscript while respecting your ideas, voice, and vision. Every change is made with your approval, ensuring your story stays authentic and true to your original intent.
